stemHtml: Which of the following correctly describes the principle of integrity monitoring within Airborne-Based Augmentation Systems (ABAS)? ABAS..

options.a: uses redundant range measurements to support Fault Detection (FD) or Fault Detection and Exclusion (FDE).
options.b: requires a Ground-Based Augmentation System (GBAS) to broadcast differential corrections and integrity messages.
options.c: uses ground-based radio navigation aids to support Fault Detection (FD) or Fault Detection and Exclusion (FDE).
options.d: requires a Satellite-Based Augmentation System (SBAS) to broadcast differential corrections and integrity messages.
